selection_reason: WP3.1 advanced source-only registry contract emission. WP6 is the next downstream source-safe closure item: bridge candidate-matched ProofPacket and countable DemoMutationEnvelope evidence into an offline reward_ledger_v1 record without consuming runtime, DB, exchange, credential, order, Cost Gate, deploy, live, or bounded Demo outcome access.
objective: Define a source-only reward_ledger_v1 contract, builder, validator, dedupe helper, and tests that accept only PROOF_READY ProofPacket plus STATUS_COUNTABLE DemoMutationEnvelope inputs and preserve source-backed lineage to PIT manifest, registry contract, acceptance report, and no-authority boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: reward_ledger_v1 builder accepts only valid PROOF_READY ProofPacket plus STATUS_COUNTABLE DemoMutationEnvelope inputs.

No-fill, cleanup, unmatched candidate/source, dry-run, dedupe, non-demo/live, proof-excluded, audit-only/non-countable, missing PIT, missing registry-required lineage, and authority aliases fail closed.
Records are source-backed: validation recomputes record, ProofPacket, DemoMutationEnvelope, PIT manifest, registry contract, and acceptance report hashes where applicable.
Registry lineage is required by default; optional execution-only mode is explicit and rejects contradictory contract-bound markers.
Dedupe and batch helpers remain in-memory/source-only and do not persist to DB/runtime state.
Focused and adjacent source tests pass and no runtime/loss-control branch is consumed.
